title: Replay Document
description: Schema for Smart Trajectory Tracker replay documents that capture simulation frames, track states, observations, and metrics.

meta.description: Metadata about the replay session including scenario configuration and timing.

scenario_name.description: Human-readable name of the scenario that produced this replay.

generated_at_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this replay document was generated.

frame_count.description: Total number of frames in the replay. Must match the length of the frames array.

dt_s.description: Simulation time step in seconds. Must be a positive finite value.

seed.description: Random seed used for reproducibility of the simulation run.

node_ids.description: Sorted list of all unique node (sensor) identifiers that appear in the replay.

track_ids.description: Sorted list of all unique track identifiers that appear in the replay.

schema_version.description: Version of the replay document schema.

enu_origin.description: Optional ENU coordinate origin used to convert geodetic coordinates.

summary.description: Aggregate statistics computed over all frames in the replay.

mean_error_m.description: Mean position error across all frames in meters.

peak_error_m.description: Maximum position error across all frames in meters.

mean_observations_per_frame.description: Average number of observations per frame.

mean_active_tracks.description: Average number of active tracks per frame.

mean_accepted_observations_per_frame.description: Average number of accepted observations per frame.

mean_rejected_observations_per_frame.description: Average number of rejected observations per frame.

total_accepted_observations.description: Total count of accepted observations across all frames.

total_rejected_observations.description: Total count of rejected observations across all frames.

observation_rejection_rate.description: Fraction of observations that were rejected (0.0 to 1.0).

rejection_counts.description: Breakdown of rejection counts by reason code.

frames.description: Ordered sequence of simulation frames capturing the full state at each time step.

vector3.description: A 3D vector represented as [x, y, z] in meters.

enu_origin.description: ENU coordinate origin defined in geodetic coordinates.

latitude_deg.description: Latitude of the origin in degrees.

longitude_deg.description: Longitude of the origin in degrees.

altitude_m.description: Altitude of the origin in meters above the WGS-84 ellipsoid.

node_state.description: State of a sensor node at a particular time step.

node_id.description: Unique identifier for this sensor node.

position.description: Position of the node in ENU coordinates (meters).

velocity.description: Velocity of the node in ENU coordinates (m/s).

is_mobile.description: Whether the node is a mobile platform as opposed to a fixed sensor or relay node.

health.description: Health score of the node (0.0 to 1.0).

sensor_type.description: Type of sensor on the node.

fov_half_angle_deg.description: Half-angle of the sensor field of view in degrees.

bearing_observation.description: A bearing-only observation from a sensor node toward a target.

node_id.description: Identifier of the observing sensor node.

origin.description: Origin point of the bearing ray in ENU coordinates.

direction.description: Unit direction vector of the bearing ray.

bearing_std_rad.description: Standard deviation of the bearing measurement in radians.

timestamp_s.description: Simulation time of the observation in seconds.

confidence.description: Confidence weight for the observation (0.0 to 1.0).

observation_rejection.description: Record of a rejected observation with diagnostic information.

node_id.description: Identifier of the sensor node that attempted the observation.

target_id.description: Identifier of the target that was being observed.

timestamp_s.description: Simulation time in seconds when the rejection occurred.

reason.description: Machine-readable reason code for the rejection.

origin.description: Origin of the attempted observation ray, if available.

attempted_point.description: Point the observation was attempting to reach.

closest_point.description: Closest point on the obstruction surface.

blocker_type.description: Type of object that blocked the observation (e.g., building, terrain).

first_hit_range_m.description: Range in meters to the first hit point along the observation ray.

truth_state.description: Ground truth state of a target at a particular time step.

position.description: True position of the target in ENU coordinates (meters).

velocity.description: True velocity of the target in ENU coordinates (m/s).

track_state.description: Estimated state of a track maintained by the fusion engine.

update_count.description: Number of measurement updates applied to this track.

stale_steps.description: Number of consecutive time steps without a measurement update.

mapping_state.description: Cumulative sensor coverage metrics at this simulation step.

localization_state.description: Aggregated localization quality across active tracks.

inspection_event.description: Record of a mobile node entering, updating coverage in, or exiting a mission zone.

deconfliction_event.description: Record of a yielded position resolution between two drones predicted to violate minimum separation.

mean_error_m.description: Mean position error across all active tracks in meters.

max_error_m.description: Maximum position error across all active tracks in meters.

active_track_count.description: Number of active tracks in this frame.

observation_count.description: Total number of observations generated in this frame.

accepted_observation_count.description: Number of observations accepted by the fusion engine.

rejected_observation_count.description: Number of observations rejected by the fusion engine.

mean_measurement_std_m.description: Mean measurement standard deviation across active tracks in meters.

track_errors_m.description: Per-track position errors in meters, keyed by track ID.

rejection_counts.description: Rejection counts by reason code for this frame.

accepted_observations_by_target.description: Accepted observation counts keyed by target ID.

rejected_observations_by_target.description: Rejected observation counts keyed by target ID.

frame.description: A single simulation frame capturing the full state at one time step.

timestamp_s.description: Simulation time of this frame in seconds.

nodes.description: States of all sensor nodes at this time step.

observations.description: Bearing observations generated and accepted in this frame.

rejected_observations.description: Observations that were rejected during fusion.

tracks.description: Track states maintained by the fusion engine at this time step.

truths.description: Ground truth target states at this time step.

metrics.description: Tracking performance metrics for this frame.

generation_rejections.description: Observations rejected during the generation phase (e.g., occlusion, out of range).

inspection_events.description: Zone-entry, coverage-update, and exit events for mobile nodes this frame.

deconfliction_events.description: Inter-drone yield events recorded when minimum separation would be violated this frame.

scan_mission_state.description: State of the scan-map-inspect mission (scanning → localizing → inspecting → egress → complete) at this frame. Present only in scan_map_inspect missions.

scan_coverage_fraction.description: Fraction of the map grid that has been scanned (0.0–1.0).

scan_coverage_threshold.description: Coverage fraction that must be reached before transitioning to the localizing phase.

phase_started_at_s.description: Simulation timestamp (seconds) when the current phase began.

newly_scanned_cells.description: Flat array of (x_m, y_m, terrain_height_m) triples for cells newly covered this frame. The viewer accumulates these into a persistent point cloud.

localization_estimates.description: Per-drone localization estimates during the localizing phase.

localization_timed_out.description: True if any drone's localization phase advanced via timeout rather than genuine convergence. Team-level flag: does not identify which specific drone(s) timed out.

coordinator_drone_id.description: Node ID of the elected mission coordinator drone (highest battery fraction at election time). Null if no coordinator has been elected yet.

poi_statuses.description: Status of each Point of Interest in the inspection phase.

position.description: World-space [x_m, y_m, z_m] position of this POI.

egress_progress.description: Per-drone return-to-home progress. Non-empty only during the egress phase.

home_position.description: World-space [x_m, y_m, z_m] of the drone's home station.

completed_poi_count.description: Number of POIs that have been fully inspected.

total_poi_count.description: Total number of POIs in this mission.
